---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-discussion"]
assignees: sanyogsingh369
---

## Feature Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you want.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? Why is this feature needed?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Include any technical details, API changes, or UI mockups.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered other approaches? Why is your proposal the best one?

## Implementation Notes (Optional)

- Affected files/modules:
- Dependencies required:
- Potential blockers:

## Priority

- [ ] Critical (blocks other work)
- [ ] High (significant improvement)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (future consideration)

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information, mockups, or references.
